description: Before taking on a new client, a paralegal must run a conflicts check to ensure the firm can ethically represent them.

nodes.task_description: Receive the names of the potential new client and all adverse parties.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent has the list of all entities to be checked.

nodes.task_description: Search the firm's client and matter database for each name provided.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent queries the database for any matches against current or former clients.

nodes.task_description: Analyze the results for any direct or positional conflicts.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent finds that the firm previously represented one of the adverse parties in an unrelated matter.

nodes.task_description: Generate a conflicts report summarizing the findings for the responsible attorney to review.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent produces a clear report detailing the potential conflict.
